response.justification: While the candidate has extensive full-stack experience and strong open-source contributions, there is no evidence of C++ or Rust development in commercial geospatial or routing systems, nor any demonstrated experience with routing tiling, navigation data pipelines, or distributed systems for map data consistency — all core requirements for the role.
strengths: Strong open-source contributions in geospatial tools (GISCollective, Open Green Map)
Proven ability to work across diverse tech stacks and languages
Experience with high-performance systems and low-latency data processing
concerns: No demonstrated commercial C++ or Rust experience in geospatial/routing contexts
Lack of evidence in distributed systems, fault tolerance, or routing tile optimization
Primary tech stack is JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang, not aligned with C++-centric role
